nodes.title: Skin-safe rebalance
widgets_values: (same composition:1.25) (similar pose and body proportions:1.2) (clean even bright youthful skin:1.7) (smooth natural retouched skin:1.45) (spotless face:1.65) (no freckles:1.55) (no moles:1.45) (no dark spots:1.65) (no horizontal skin lines:1.55) (no acne:1.45) (no watermark:1.5) (no text:1.4) (no emoji:1.4) (no stickers:1.4) (no overlay symbols:1.4)

nodes.title: Skin dark spot cleanup before VAE

widgets_values:
Denoise notes:

Around 0.45 preserves composition and pose better, but skin cleanup is weaker.

Higher denoise changes the image more. Around 0.82 is a practical skin-clean preset, but pose fidelity is less guaranteed.

For portraits, use lower denoise for structure and a second pass or dedicated retouch workflow for skin if needed.

nodes.title: Reverse caption / manual supplement
widgets_values: Emphasize clean, even skin glow and natural clothing folds. No dot-like dark spots, no horizontal skin lines, no dirty color patches. No extra characters, animals, or props. Clean scene, warm mood.

Colored symbol / watermark cleaner:

Detects high-contrast black, white, or selected-color strokes such as text, emoji, stickers, captions, watermarks, and colorful icons.

Recommended before both Krea2 Skin-Safe Rebalance and VAEEncode so Krea2 visual tokens do not copy small unwanted structures.
